heading: Amount of tolls
label: 508 Amount of tolls
text: Tolls for passage or transit over any bridge constructed under the authority of the Act of , commonly known as the “Bridge Act of 1906”, the General Bridge Act of 1946 [ et seq.], and the International Bridge Act of 1972 [ et seq.] shall be just and reasonable.March 23, 190633 U.S.C. 52533 U.S.C. 535
notes: References in TextAct of , commonly known as the “Bridge Act of 1906”, referred to in text, is , , which enacted sections 491 to 494 and 495 to 498 of this title. For complete classification of this Act of the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.March 23, 1906act Mar. 23, 1906, ch. 113034 Stat. 84section 491 of this titleThe General Bridge Act of 1946, referred to in text, is title V of , , which is classified generally to subchapter III (§ 525 et seq.) of this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.act Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 75360 Stat. 847section 525 of this titleThe International Bridge Act of 1972, referred to in text, is , , , which is classified principally to subchapter IV (§ 535 et seq.) of this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 92–43486 Stat. 731section 535 of this titleSept. 26, 1972
